data.title: 国际服Arcie小编普拉娜泳装换装回 #29

data.body:
CM Arcie’s 29th live stream is coming tomorrow, Sensei!
You will come celebrate Blue Archive’s 4th anniversary with us, right?🌟
 
 🗓️Date & Time: 11/19 (Wed) 1:00 AM (UTC)
 ➡️YouTube Link: youtube.com/live/s5auRemU_…
